response.justification: The candidate has 12+ years of professional experience with strong C++ background (C, C++ in embedded and desktop contexts) and SQL experience, but the majority of recent roles (Naver, Tencent, Dunnhumby) focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and other modern stacks rather than Windows-based C++ development. Domain expertise in capital markets is entirely missing, and financial-services experience is limited to investment practices reshaping (RIDE Capital) and investment banking-adjacent roles (MercadoLibre founder role lacks direct relevance). Summit platform and Kafka experience are absent.
strengths: 12+ years of professional software development with C/C++ experience (including embedded and desktop systems)
Strong SQL proficiency (MongoDB, MySQL, and general SQL knowledge)
Proven ability to work in fast-paced, high-scale environments (Dunnhumby's millions of HTTP requests/sec)
concerns: Lack of recent C++ development on Windows platform (most recent C++ roles are from 2014-2015)
No demonstrated experience with fixed income, capital markets, or Summit platform
Majority of recent work focuses on JavaScript/TypeScript rather than C++
